meta_description: Website builder powered by artificial intelligence. Describe your business in text — get a ready-made website in 2 minutes. No code, no designer needed. Try it free.
og_title: Promto Website Builder — Your Site in 2 Minutes
og_description: Create a professional website in 2 minutes with Promto's AI builder. Simply describe your business — the neural network handles the rest.
hero_subtitle: Describe your business — and AI creates a ready website in 2 minutes. No code or designer required.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: Website in 2 Minutes
advantages.description: AI generates a complete website with texts, structure, and design immediately after your description.

advantages.title: Professional Design
advantages.description: Modern look without hiring a designer — the neural network selects the style that matches your business.

advantages.title: No Code Required
advantages.description: No need to know HTML, CSS, or JavaScript. The builder does everything for you.

advantages.title: One-Click Publishing
advantages.description: Your finished website is immediately live on the internet. Connect your own domain or use ours.

advantages.title: SEO Built-In
advantages.description: Website is optimized for search engines: meta tags, structure, and loading speed are configured automatically.

advantages.title: Edit Anytime
advantages.description: Change texts, blocks, and style at any moment — no developer or queues needed.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Business
how_it_works.description: Write a few sentences about what you do. For example: 'I sell custom cakes in Moscow.'

how_it_works.title: AI Creates Your Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network analyzes your description and generates a complete website: structure, texts, colors, and blocks.

how_it_works.title: Customize to Your Liking
how_it_works.description: Edit any element: change text, add photos, modify the color scheme.

how_it_works.title: Publish Your Website
how_it_works.description: Click 'Publish' — and your website is live. Connect your domain in two clicks.

faq.question: What is an AI website builder?
faq.answer: An AI website builder is a service that uses artificial intelligence to automatically create websites. You don't need to assemble pages from blocks: just describe your business in text, and AI will create a ready website.

faq.question: Do I need development or design experience?
faq.answer: No. Promto is designed for people with no technical experience. If you can describe your business in words — you're ready to go.

faq.question: Can I edit the website after generation?
faq.answer: Yes. After generation, you can change any text, block, color, or image through the visual editor.

faq.question: Will the builder work for my business?
faq.answer: Promto is suitable for any type of business: stores, services, portfolios, restaurants, clinics, agencies, and much more.

faq.question: How quickly is a website created?
faq.answer: The first version of the website is ready in just 2 minutes after entering your description — that's dozens of times faster than working with a freelancer.

faq.question: Is there a free plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a website and test all basic features for free. Paid plans unlock custom domains and advanced features.

cta_mid_title: Try the Website Builder for Free
cta_mid_subtitle: Enter your business description and get a ready website in just 2 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: No skills, no code. Just your business and 2 minutes of your time.
